textByHashes.5a1141fa29a2102d283d83466fecd59a145b93dd: Your stories have entertained me. I will let you into the cave for a short time.
textByHashes.33e8938c208334a8b91601c67e3fd32dac043f44: It is not normal for the Tears to have that effect.
textByHashes.29a6a2f32d27894aa53e8ba4a9f63eaa9b62225a: It is a sign. The power of the Tears has marked you for a special purpose.
textByHashes.f3b08773fe0cc1a4e9ea33ca864224157b77ec19: I cannot tell you more now. That mark will soon fade, but someday it will glow again, and on that day you should return to me so that I can tell you more about your destiny.
textByHashes.85662b1bc4c3bb2fe2f19086c23c3acdc462c79f: That cannot be. She had not yet returned to learn of her destiny. The mark that the tears gave her had not begun to glow again.
textByHashes.3c212d1c3e3fa55b473be79bbbe61dccf8bc73fd: This is indeed strange. I must commune with mighty Guthix and the forces of destiny.
textByHashes.4aeb3e315eef29a71b06f5ca76d805a384a23e11: Zanik's death was premature. The gods will allow it to be reversed.
textByHashes.0cd8ff666b216aef659cd9ffb713e5abcb0a8933: The Tears of Guthix have powers beyond the understanding of mortals. They can restore her to life, with the gods' permission.
textByHashes.d761a381158629fcd4194de2b1652617caa6a095: You must collect some of the tears using Zanik's tear-bowl. Although I would not normally deem you worthy to collect the tears, I will let you into the cave for this special purpose.
textByHashes.69649eb5aceec9d62c9679df0df85a5152bc5a66: You must collect some of the tears using Zanik's tear-bowl. I will not count this against the next time you can collect the tears for yourself.
textByHashes.d129f4d41fe6661268798242290327c4a3af7494: You must have both hands free to carry the bowl. Speak to me again when your hands are free.
textByHashes.2cd868bd170139d2474380a9084fc574fe84fa7d: Twenty tears should be sufficient. Collect twenty blue tears, but remember that green tears will decrease the amount of blue.
textByHashes.54b07020fb6ee622a3d442dd0998233d6a188dbf: Then the forces of destiny must wait until a time that is more convenient for you.
textByHashes.49c3261024ec09196a3fd73f7cbf13a96f0ec5fe: Zanik has not yet fulfilled her destiny, so the gods will allow her to be resurrected. You must collect some of the Tears of Guthix to allow this to happen.
textByHashes.0895411294bbc069eb6079d65c06cf21458c5689: You will need to collect twenty tears in order to resurrect Zanik.
textByHashes.bbdd3fae91741c00eba86b2590595690a60978c3: Then I will call upon their power.
textByHashes.9f14b360499066fa6ef459b8b601332beca23f46: Listen to me, Zanik. You are marked for a special purpose, and you have been granted new life so that you can carry it out. Your destiny is to lead all goblins into a new age.
textByHashes.9321cd4f30c30dd17609b138f927abb6defb764f: Someday you will know. But today you must hurry to foil the plot that even now threatens your home!
textByHashes.f35fb8e4b8de7abc93c3d2ec0e25920052434c7d: But first you will need to make a bowl in which to collect the tears.
textByHashes.ef6c61dc27e89de5b16a9e903cf31cb378b26986: There is a cave on the south side of the chasm that is similarly infused with the power of Guthix. The stone in that cave is the only substance that can catch the Tears of Guthix.
textByHashes.b4bac585b2502384c8c276265719109004738529: Mine some stone from that cave, make it into a bowl, and bring it to me, and then I will let you catch the Tears.
textByHashes.74d531515d1cd61b27265210327e31deb3da646a: Hmm. Maybe you should come back when you do.
textByHashes.b60d0137389f07e0d3f653ea464e2ac493d69fe5: I have been waiting here three thousand years, guarding the Tears of Guthix. I serve my master faithfully, but I am bored.
textByHashes.40a757030a84e8ae72ec593714a7b71aadcd2192: An adventurer such as yourself must have many tales to tell. If you can entertain me, I will let you into the cave for a time.
textByHashes.c0f15c9305fa3710eb928582b55e5373d7ef9154: The more I enjoy your story, the more time I will give you in the cave.
textByHashes.8190a324be24267d7f19412498afdcc5f517f291: Then you can drink of the power of balance, which will make you stronger in whatever area you are weakest.
textByHashes.d752d7a72929b8930275f1cc8fdb67a017104f17: The Third Age of the world was a time of great conflict, of destruction never seen before or since, when all the gods save Guthix warred for control.
textByHashes.bd0847facc024fe2611ea82076814add9f777834: The colossal Wyrms, of whom today's dragons are a pale reflection, turned all the sky to fire, while on the ground armies of foot soldiers, goblins and trolls and humans, filled the valleys and plains with blood.
textByHashes.8838b475f66ec489bd4d3019056259a012d744ca: In time the noise of the conflict woke Guthix from His deep slumber, and He rose and stood in the centre of the battlefield so that the splendour of His wrath filled the world, and He called for the conflict to cease!
textByHashes.01f8399a6de2aac6f56b97f7ac9e440d8fa71a24: Silence fell, for the gods knew that none could challenge the power of the mighty Guthix -- for His power is that of nature itself, to which all other things are subject, in the end.
textByHashes.ee994f01cf3b7c227e090677e4a4ea0b7f0b4a32: Guthix reclaimed that which had been stolen from Him, and went back underground to return to His sleep and continue to draw the world's power into Himself.
textByHashes.f3d5889eb8a5f51721479ba145d343f444fc4ef3: But on His way into the depths of the earth He sat and rested in this cave; and, thinking of the battle-scarred desert that now stretched from one side of His world to the other, He wept.
textByHashes.68e52f30d96e7a9e4a4d3d6d7e4a814bf9b936cf: And so great was His sorrow, and so great was His life- giving power, that the rocks themselves began to weep with Him.
textByHashes.654059534b7205af0a95b042ed43af262c209de9: Later, Guthix noticed that the rocks continued to weep, and that their tears were infused with a small part of His power.
textByHashes.5773962b281d26194fc92962989ac59aca142d17: So He set me, His servant, to guard the cave, and He entrusted to me the task of judging who was and was not worthy to access the tears.
textByHashes.fcde565fb981e2ff822d25d82d7948ebc93adf52: I have already told you my story, and you have not told me yours!
textByHashes.c22775960785d501a23b7f0dafda4735dd44b952: A magnet and an undead chicken? Really?
textByHashes.950da80d0a0db506dccf2c3c20a044a061f69591: I am always glad to hear tales of the Dorgeshuun.
textByHashes.da8995b3ffa40c1eab2b8c941c6637b8d7b8d4ff: Deception of the people by their rulers is a terrible thing.
textByHashes.f64ea0c80bef1f2d23ddc68a1611d2d3aa49f41b: One should never underestimate the uses of the vegetables of Guthix.
textByHashes.78d2f0632c698448d287cf1a4ce5a08ebeb30d5e: I have no knowledge of this Ralos you speak of. How curious...
textByHashes.22fcc8c33861224f51d144d50912f9abd3d5e063: The paranoia and ambition of the penguins' leaders will not serve their people well.
textByHashes.af447ff9ab374b01686f889dcb163593bc7aa1c8: Ah, a happy ending. It would not be good for such an anniversary to go unmarked.
textByHashes.ae21819cbef57a12775e5793f0b171bd7d930195: With the power to create life comes responsibility. I see that Fenkenstrain was not up to the task.
textByHashes.ff5364185fc3ad2a22dd14ac5b7f1c4abd355d71: It seems you humans are always coming up with new political systems. This one sounds like it might need a bit more work...
textByHashes.594fdd64da0e3fdefa30c0d265b1134f8f1f3ffe: The separation of heart from man is not natural. It is good you are looking to resolve such matters.
textByHashes.37e166938c954a49b9e82f9a403394b75bce587d: I am sure you will have many more adventures on behalf of the Myreque. Then, perhaps, you will have even more stories to tell me.
textByHashes.fe394c02ad0d0f2249afc59840a1be5072ddeeaa: Zanik still has her destiny to fulfil, and I have a feeling you will have a part in that.
textByHashes.558ddc16879249afb34c4102cf1a9403ce7b3bbd: Ambition is so often the death of reason. It is good you were able to find the culprit.
textByHashes.c74f126e55378a84d97a8c37b5eb641fb05a3012: I remember Delrith. A most unpleasant character; I am glad he has been dispatched.
textByHashes.2b95f5a518a096d91a26a1de6a22ef9b5f7c964e: I suggest you think about the origin of those spells. Ancient magics are not to be toyed with.
textByHashes.42e89f5eeb256a513d318861272fc8b6fa001903: For an artefact like that to be unleashed upon this world... Let us hope this is not the end of the story.
textByHashes.a7b0a0452957038b8e2183a71d38e971e0dd846f: Zaros? I had not heard that name for a thousand years even before the start of my sojourn here.
textByHashes.112b51023178a81f6d77e00b7312fb20c0b12803: Such a small task hardly seems worthy of the term 'quest'.
textByHashes.3db3ab4a95473567dee3714b92f4d89f1eea8cfb: The dragonkin once brought this world to the brink of ruin. It is good you stopped them from doing so again.
textByHashes.dbf73932ccd0dfbc69b96da22b1a2d973a0ee9e5: Fear is the most insidious enemy of all.
textByHashes.944321044919949b3e1c129f153725d3e0f78011: So war still rages in the world above? Will you never tire of creating machines of destruction?
textByHashes.bad336a20fcc44602103ba21c4b16299995b0a7f: You should be careful about meddling with your own head.
textByHashes.3da2768e8f5a641c1a0db8cbf4631aa21851bd80: A battle between two such powerful beings will take much time and unleash much energy. I hope that the natural world is not damaged in this conflict!
textByHashes.32be651eabda005d714d43b2c5d5b9be78b45a02: That was a good deed. It is a terrible thing to be locked out of one's natural form.
textByHashes.113f83b16f87b495090a705a1247daf17d77a9ef: Is it ever right to steal? It is a conundrum older than time, though I think in this case, the answer is clear.
textByHashes.441febbe410a1c196181dd7df926c8793b419ab0: These fairies seem to be well versed in the powers of nature.
textByHashes.6d271ab034bd67c791265132ca90f1fc95ffa3d8: She let her greed consume her, and paid the ultimate price.
textByHashes.a2f2bbbb0d1549c80b6b4705257309562da52737: Fishing? A strange test of worthiness to pass through an underground tunnel!
textByHashes.21d4f1f944775711f25121b6f16730f3051e8b3d: You must be careful not to let drink muddle your brain!
textByHashes.df4480fda99c2dae7b0cb8a54ae8b8f2db875e70: It is good that you can take time from slaying and adventuring to grow a beautiful garden.
textByHashes.433e09ee3550202064fcea518b3c16ee79a57ae9: Cats are one of the most mysterious creatures of Guthix. I hope you take your responsibility seriously.
textByHashes.c62f88374938f3a1db9a9385d9224f2ace7c09b8: I have a feeling that Keldagrim will be the setting of many great adventures for you.
textByHashes.9eeff3438287a5c1be78c3ea595319f1922cc2ac: Poor silly goblins! Their race had such potential, if only they could rise above their petty squabbles.
textByHashes.e904df93384d9d3274e4f03c914bc4120a55d525: I remember well the battle of Uzer.
textByHashes.e8157ef1334a1669e1887fed0c94ea783754db4d: Your tales are often very curious, .
textByHashes.d49fddeb4e1243c16420d1f8190998d6309f4e06: A victim dies and a murderer is punished. That is balance.
textByHashes.cd9a67617819cef11b361d43997596f57643dd3c: So the vile Mahjarrat still walk the earth above? Then Zamorak's defeat was not as thorough as I had thought.
textByHashes.7511b38ddeb5ea3c388e1e71e1d62ab94cbf51d2: It is a rare privilege to understand the language of those beings. You should listen carefully to all that they say - but not believe too much of it.
textByHashes.fa5905f572988626994add454183f4c42f090ab4: Imps! I remember the age of great war, when armies of Zamorak's imps bloodied the ankles of the other gods' creatures.
textByHashes.8233acd7b712402d5cfb365f4e4992558ce65009: The Dorgeshuun goblins have been good neighbors during my vigil here. They are a timid race, but not cowardly, and I am glad they have the peace they desire.
textByHashes.a024085e7e06e762136c7ca8fe58580d896b6e9c: The Moon Clan's reliance on magic is no more balanced than the Fremennik's hatred of it.
textByHashes.ea9623213174304210a6148c096bc5bc10a8b12b: By remembering the past, one should be able to avoid repeating its mistakes. Yet the mortal races show no sign of abandoning their obsession with war and bloodshed.
textByHashes.3e8aca1b72d7f16eb67671c97ec966c85d601dca: A masked killer slashing vulnerable young people in a deserted mansion? Is that what stories have become in this day and age? How formulaic!
textByHashes.2dea31babd62a34d1e862512f3c4ea055e1c7130: I hope they supplied something more suitable for the child to drink.
textByHashes.b895ae48ed0f01ef93ef069b77e40f6a80b13534: I see they couldn't make a monkey out of you!
textByHashes.555e02ce28dbc0ee650ce6a5f45a0760e6cbf725: Glough's evil plans always threaten to upset the balance of our world. I am pleased you were able to stop him.
textByHashes.2fb32e43cbd3ee0683315b76f2d433698afbd921: Brief is life, but more precious if its passing is properly honoured.
textByHashes.5c8170dd757c7218c8f1fad240cca2fb5863f196: It is good that a troll wishes to study the complex skill that is Farming.
textByHashes.1b1bda418a5a6bbfbd17f1597455a39ebd86efcb: The names of trolls never cease to amaze me.
textByHashes.af73b50683765640cf9ec439c0360eb2af57437a: That is a fitting reward for a dedicated servant of Guthix. Thank you for helping him.
textByHashes.aeab5863a564adda5ff24bd57dee0c68f160182a: It is good that you have helped a servant of Guthix to his rest.
textByHashes.c9cf21d23be53ffb3ac2890d65ca851734fe6243: It is long since I have seen the stars...
textByHashes.221924a351999e4b5c3675569fea496916841595: A truly exciting tail of failing and needing to be rescued.
textByHashes.bf990b7a2386172efb48e2acc06f1ffd3c123d2f: A nagua? It has been a long time since I last heard of their kind...
textByHashes.e616d9d3004bada54707a10d3d8d18ddc28ef116: Such is ever the folly of pirates, the bury their loot in the ground so that another can dig it up.
textByHashes.57928f1789456537a0ea5d85dc17b2059f4b4ad0: What could that man have wanted all those bones for? Collecting that many bones cannot be a balanced activity.
textByHashes.78d0103d2bc79b9cebeab4121cda6af6805cd148: Rats are a highly unbalanced creature and it is right that their numbers be controlled.
textByHashes.08fa1f7a6dbe80aa4adf1712652b09c9aef5a4c3: That evil wizard's time spells sent a ripple through the fabric of balance. I am glad he is no longer at large!
textByHashes.2f93ba23f94f76587b5797ecb18d02c6a7f53f75: I have heard tales of these 'Temple Knights' from many years past. Be wary, their motivations are not what they might lead you to believe.
textByHashes.37f3e4e6c7b907a9d82c68e9047abedf714e9194: Forgive me, , but that story was quite... unusual.
textByHashes.3dc5f06e2336233f095f174cfabcac34e8cae4b7: A strange attachment to an item that has no use after one's death.
textByHashes.2ed2485c6d981e9796bc02f74f23be78fa8f174e: Never was a story of more woe That this of Juliet and her Romeo.
textByHashes.9c2d87cd9ff469a04b12913aae41f84d77d01065: War? What is it good for?
textByHashes.f3788a9e90bd4ad1e2f874c5ffd3a94561391d74: Drunken zombie pirates? What is the world coming to?
textByHashes.ddaef9859322f49a45b933ac88574b025631283e: So the mortals above have discovered magic once more? Very interesting.
textByHashes.95f4f700dd61bf11c8812fa2816698964ab4efe5: Be very careful of the Mahjarrat, . None of them are to be trusted.
textByHashes.c3240492267db5d3825a95bdf4df1aed8976bd1c: Agrith-Naar was one of the demons my master banished at the end of the great war. It seems he found a way to work around the ban on direct intervention.
textByHashes.8699d32eb3630294bd010c1764591e1f9423cc8c: Ever curious, the continued evolution of creatures, isn't it?
textByHashes.72c2732ae4800c795c0427d1b888e25b325e4420: Nature gave sheep their wool for a reason, you know. I hope they were not too cold.
textByHashes.e84bc39485cc46d936b92ac557457da51c41dfbf: That was a strange response to such an unfortunate event. But the motives of the Temple Knights have always been incomprehensibly unbalanced.
textByHashes.dd76890a4c3482164824a23df7ac57ef0bb1f153: The most fearsome monsters are to be found in the darkness of our own minds.
textByHashes.27330e43f6593fe4f594d1e702ee8bfef430046f: It is a terrible thing for people to turn away from their religion. I think the spirits taught the town a lesson.
textByHashes.2b2560efeba00b86006273bb7d28bd7ad99df100: A hat is just a hat, .
textByHashes.a51b36eb0e0b0bd2974a42bdbbb03c65f6fefa92: Bob the Cat? I have heard of that strange creature but have never been able to fathom him. It is no small achievement for you to be able to!
textByHashes.6d404d056ccdce0ab03e13044b0f820082fe32e4: The loss of a friend is never easy. However, you should always remember to be thankful of the time you had together.
textByHashes.7d06dcd10ec84021875ce0cb697e38eaac33d889: I knew that story already, in fact, but I suppose your own perspective of the events is a valid tale in itself.
textByHashes.e7dda9296261d5bca37e012c9df03650b4fd9ec8: The alchemists walked a dangerous path when they created that homunculus. I am glad that events ended well for the creature.
textByHashes.b5ef6d5b3ea147bd02ab3c964fc1912e9b5407d5: Yes, it seems he sacrificed his sanity for power. Power often comes with a cost, and the highest cost is often the one you do not immediately see...
textByHashes.24a830b0aa1fb7109d2fb57c08167d2cb36e14fb: The last time a Mahjarrat was in possession of the Stone, this world saw destruction unlike anything imaginable. Still, good may yet come of this. We shall see.
textByHashes.96ec8ba11d8c18f3ea32b46156fa8058326882cf: It is often hard to know how long a task will take when we begin it.
textByHashes.e76985656728e32d4c1d39676412c2ad68d7c4bc: I see you are on your way to becoming strong in the magical arts.
textByHashes.60829b4a501a9655279ad93ef67e5afcb6c12d4d: Zombie Ogres!? Some of the foulest creatures of Zamorak. In the great wars the zogre armies could repel the forces of Saradomin with their stench alone!
textByHashes.be8aadfe1a0ec7028e569da147881fc9eeb63ceb: Before you can collect the Tears of Guthix you must make a bowl out of the stone in the cave on the south of the chasm.
textByHashes.cadf160772255affd1f8a26df11eb5e905c17d14: I will tell you the story of the light-creatures.
textByHashes.643004dcef51d11b7422c8bcd7d2fb87dec69fc9: Myriad and beautiful were the creatures and civilizations of the early ages of the world. Gielinor was a work of art, shaped lovingly over the millennia by the creative mind of Guthix.
textByHashes.700977d24ea9d7f9d0f0977a6f6d2b9265df4261: Only the sturdiest races survived the Godwars, and even then only by abandoning their high culture and gearing their societies towards war. Of the more delicate races there is now no trace, and almost no memory.
textByHashes.92c94bcb1ad258f033cb3bd7b35c6376decb90ae: One such race had bodies as fragile as snowflakes, yet they built crystal cities that stood for a thousand years.
textByHashes.3a071fce04199114864c29d30687fcd2293c5706: The wind would whisper through the spires and fill them with sweet harmonies, and the rising sun would shine through the precious gems that studded the towers and create inter plays of light as if rainbows were dancing.
textByHashes.23b6b4f720e9aba1699823d8ba5c95c15713f9f6: Indeed, so marvellous was this light-show at its height that the patterns of light themselves became alive, and great flocks of luminous creatures rode along the gem- cast beams, each drawn to its own colour.
textByHashes.b694b418083dd25b7a851e3b6c7f50738d494b04: The creatures you see floating in this chasm are the last sorry remnants of that age. I do not know how they made their way here and survived to this time, but I am grateful for their company.
textByHashes.6ca922405b1d4fea7a603b7284909c51b15c9a62: Perhaps you should use it with a chisel, rather than with my face.
textByHashes.60b863514ac97499f98a045a9751df98cb64fb7f: I will keep your bowl for you, so that you may collect the tears many times in the future.
textByHashes.a4e424241eff3b5e1944e579994581de302c65dc: Now... tell me another story, and I will let you collect the tears for the first time.
textByHashes.5e542a794a76fdb2c988b7dfbb4a7b9ba41db0ce: Are you sure your intentions are pure? Look into your heart. The power Movario and his master seek, a part of you wants this power for yourself.
textByHashes.beb8ae620593a1da0848343d0692e232ede186a0: You must stop him and his master. This is a quest that matters above all others.
textByHashes.517f0168bd0b30cb64907e16127f12e90bab4027: Perhaps you should empty your hands before you begin.
textByHashes.005baff7542bfdd534e946b92359db977d52bf54: Your story has entertained me. But it is a poor sort of adventurer who only tells stories of the past and does not find new stories to tell. I will not let you into the cave again until you have had more adventures!
textByHashes.d11a177f08fdbd0416406c083faed4779ce3f9ae: It has not been long since your last visit. Come back [tomorrow/in .
textByHashes.9878b9af07c01dc40bbaf751b705d8e952feb769: I fear you will have no new stories to tell me. Come again when you have had more adventures.
textByHashes.eca62c5db864aebc98850229772c204e622d3e13: I fear you will have no new stories to tell me. Come again [tomorrow/in if you have had more adventures by then.
textByHashes.154f59cd071b3f6607b554a7d849be6c789ed4a1: I must warn you though, the Tears cannot help you with your sailing abilities at this time, for Guthix does not wish to interfere with the balance.
textByHashes.41745c1651f30fa653767f90eec5d674960ed5b4: Collect as much as you can from the blue streams. If you let in water from the green streams, it will take away from the blue. For Guthix is god of balance, and balance lies in the juxtaposition of opposites.
textByHashes.ad52727e4bd27cf7a249289e2db852f2bf924b3b: Not long after the start of my vigil a party of goblins happened on my cave. These were the ugly brutes of the gods' armies, but their armour bore a faded patch where the symbol of a god had been removed.
textByHashes.48689cfc584a0e9da239b5bc980863e13cb1e8bd: They looked around hesitantly, squinting in the light of crude torches, but as soon as they saw me they raised their spears and charged.
textByHashes.b31c85a9d4d19b7f9239fa75251d85f1a67ee33f: No one may access the Tears of Guthix by force. I sent them tumbling into the chasm.
textByHashes.293e83416b01fd61e8ef6444c9bcb18aed109666: Two hundred years later another goblin found me. This one was unarmed, and although she was very wary I succeeded in engaging her in conversation.
textByHashes.dab350c30d31071bd1052ad888b66380311b3f7c: Since then I have had many more visits from the descendants of those lost warriors, and over the centuries I have seen them change.
textByHashes.250fd9d5d9788a5fcfa3171ae2a891f796c0cf83: They have become timid rather than aggressive, and I have seen the light of intelligence grow in their bulging eyes.
textByHashes.939882bb4a60396c080f727d992c1aafe2310f1d: Their stories are repetitive and grim, of scraping a living out of the harsh rock and through ingenuity and toil shaping it into a home.
textByHashes.82cbe115193c819e91ef8311effa47f8559a7196: I have followed the progress of their race, but their individual stories hold little interest for me.
textByHashes.cd6da0fe972083f4c1a5de9f32180dc01ff66bad: Very well, when you are eligible to drink from the Tears, you shall be reminded daily.
textByHashes.351111ea6a15d1a7e9a0e4d5798aa3c996cb824b: Very well, it will be up to you to remember when you can return. It is good that you are willing to take responsibility for yourself in this way.
textByHashes.494e9a88dc632140e2241f5f5f7f32bda5edfb5a: So many aeons have passed since these were made. So many mortals have been born, lived their lives, then died as Balance requires. What stories they must have known!
textByHashes.22ba2552d686dfe73c612294517124f440a5c8cc: I would be happy to honour the dead by combining such an icon with your Staff of the Dead. Give the items to me, if you wish.
textByHashes.f0f64833379f811fad3d03555c29d70ff224d7d8: I would happily honour the dead, and all the stories they must have known, by combining your Staff of the Dead with your icon of my master, Guthix. But this cannot be undone; they will be bound forever.
textByHashes.3b4c4ca23a270b41cec44bc44f32e60cf663b49d: I would be happy to honour the dead by combining such an icon with a Staff of the Dead, if you bring one to me.
textByHashes.4c6eecb813afe87a45fa30573df44c5eaf0ee36d: It was, but I appear to have combined it with an icon already.
textByHashes.12207e4ebab4c68254028ab262ad32637217513e: I cannot combine it with that.
textByHashes.a4f20638ae2ecfe063d41c659505345c89273536: It is not what I seek.
textByHashes.76b02b49e54b0d7652db79a7899280d22cad165c: I will not permit you to be in the cave for long. Collect as many tears as you can.
textByHashes.ca3c7dd8b2546c730121913cb4a932c2b1d8c0e1: If you wish to tell me more stories, come out here first.
textByHashes.2ea58bb51c6fff789bd7f8ced6bc439fb4ac594d: A Staff of the Dead! I would happily honour the dead, and all the stories they must have known, by combining your staff with an icon of my master, Guthix.
textByHashes.34e8894b57182b8dafb2771db5c67b351ce9d900: Perhaps you can find such an icon and bring it to me.
textByHashes.8049401e1e4d3248a3ab0dc0449cef291bd3e17f: I would happily honour the dead by combining such an icon with a Staff of the Dead, if you bring one to me.
textByHashes.dbf0ee0db57435c9b118f158011e35e860e40a36: I can do nothing more with that.
textByHashes.ea5e86de10eb5ba06f76a6cd1cf205c6640e4d6e: I cannot combine your icon with that weapon.
textByHashes.c6d6ecf12297b10ccfd972fdf0b8add4b2486ef4: I do not need that from you.
textByHashes.5630362ff9ee844c5b3e79208bb6579833ed8495: Hey, I have something for you but you don't have any space for it!
textByHashes.36a19e2982332f6643984cb3d03f71da3ce8a14f: Your dedication to balance is astounding adventurer.
